scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev --workspace @grizcam/api" "npm run dev --workspace @grizcam/web"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @grizcam/shared && npm run lint --workspace @grizcam/api && npm run lint --workspace @grizcam/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @grizcam/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @grizcam/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @grizcam/web
